title: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever
display_title: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever
wikitext:
[]: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Aug 15, 2021 12:06 pm Welcome, I heard opinions on Polish forums and groups on FB about Evangelion that the Shinji x Asuka ship is the worst ship ever, I like it, I would like to hear your opinions whether you like it or not.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Aug 15, 2021 2:26 pm Well, those exaggerated superlatives are sure gonna be conducive to objective discussion.... I mean I don't ship it except as an angst/drama thing, but you got a serious lack of imagination if you can't picture anything worse than some teens hatefucking. It doesn't even involve a single billionaire or dictator. Also, worst by what standard?

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Aug 15, 2021 3:14 pm Nani? I don't understoond.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Aug 16, 2021 4:38 pm What Kendrix is saying is that trying to ratify something as subjective as shipping into "best" and "worst" labels is an inherently pointless endeavor; a sentiment to which I unilaterally agree

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:15 pm The quality of a ship is in your mind; it is not something objective that can be decided or proved by others for you. So make your own decision - and if you feel the need to announce and defend that in public, do it calmly, and with some plausible reasons.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by Stuart » Fri Aug 20, 2021 8:02 am It makes sense within the story. They have this love-hate relationship where they can't admit their feelings for each other. Like when Asuka wants to kiss Shinji, she has to use the excuse that she's bored and then over-dramatically rinse out her mouth afterwards. In Ep 26, we see them as childhood friends in the alternative universe, where their classmates tease them about their feelings for each other. So, there's plenty of ammo there for it to be a "canon" ship.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by penguintruth » Fri Aug 20, 2021 3:05 pm Shinjix SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by Archer » Sat Aug 21, 2021 1:02 am Stuart wrote: It makes sense within the story. They have this love-hate relationship where they can't admit their feelings for each other. Like when Asuka wants to kiss Shinji, she has to use the excuse that she's bored and then over-dramatically rinse out her mouth afterwards. In Ep 26, we see them as childhood friends in the alternative universe, where their classmates tease them about their feelings for each other. So, there's plenty of ammo there for it to be a "canon" ship.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Fri Aug 27, 2021 10:05 pm Well, the whole relationship between them is…rocky at best. I can see how most people would view them as toxic to each other. In EoE, their relationship plays an important theme throughout the film, as it displays the hedgehog’s dilemma through and through. And we saw them reach out to each other at the end. Rebuild of Evangelion is kind of a different story, but I won’t go into detail there.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Aug 31, 2021 3:02 pm Who Shinji is shipped with, the reasons behind the shipping, and the reaction to anyone holding an opinion different than theirs say far more about the shipper than about any of the characters in the show.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Sat Sep 04, 2021 8:06 pm C.T.1290 wrote: And we saw them reach out to each other at the end...

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by T. K. Simon » Sat Sep 04, 2021 8:45 pm NightComesOn wrote: C.T.1290#930219 wrote: And we saw them reach out to each other at the end...

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Sep 05, 2021 1:01 am Seriously? Interesing, never watching situation from the perspective.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Tue Sep 07, 2021 9:55 pm NightComesOn wrote: C.T.1290#930219 wrote: And we saw them reach out to each other at the end...

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Sep 26, 2021 10:55 am It's definitely the big brained ship.

[]: Re: Is Ship Shinji x Asuka the worst ship ever?             Quote Post by MissDeamy » Mon Dec 04, 2023 7:05 pm Well...I am an AsuShin shipper (I am going to have to stop saying that at some point I feel like it's getting annoying) and that ship gets a few mixed feelings from everyone in the Eva fandom. I don't really care what people ship as long as it isn't with Misato or any other adults with the Eva Pilots. I understand what it gets it's hate, people think they are going to be in a toxic relationship, and they are going to be toxic with one another considering that Asuka bullies and picks on Shinji, and Shinji doesn't like that. Despite them genuinely hating each other I can see there is some sort of bond there, however, I think in the earlier episodes before Asuka was introduced everyone was used to Shinji and Rei since they both seemed to be getting closer but the moment Asuka appears that bond with Shinji and Rei is just gone or at least didn't build up further after that. I mostly see Rei being some sort of sister figure to Shinji (considering Rei is a clone of his mom) but that's just my opinion. As for Kaworu? Uhh, I guess that's okay if you ignore the fact that he's an angel, I can also see him and Shinji happening. (I am not going to talk about Mari cause I still haven't watched Rebuild so I have no idea what her deal at all yet) In the end, it isn't the worst ship ever but it is also not the best ship ever. I am still going to AsuShin cause it makes my dumb dumb brain happy. Ship who you want to ship, as long as it isn't illegal lol
